name: Peking Roast
recipeIngredient: 3 lbs. chuck or English cut roast
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim all the bone and fat from the meat.
2. Poke vertical slits in the meat with a paring knife.
3. Put slivers of onion and garlic in the slits.
4. Place the meat in a baking dish or cake pan.
5. Pour vinegar over the roast, making sure it runs into the slits.
6. Marinate for 24 hours in the refrigerator, turning several times.
7. Brown the meat in a large, heavy, greased saucepan until very browned.
8. Pour off any grease.
9. Add coffee, vinegar marinade, water, salt, and pepper.
10. Bring to a boil.
11. Reduce heat and cover.
12. Simmer for 4 to 6 hours.
13. Remove the meat from the liquid and trim off remaining bone and fat as you put it on a serving plate.
Serves 6 to 10.
Yield: 10 (3 oz.) servings
Exchanges: 3 lean meat; Cal: 169; Protein: 26 gm; Carb: 2 gm; Sodium: 241 mg; Fat: 7 gm.
